Insists I give my personal profile information,  including contacts,  in order to see any score statistics.  Feels like once you deny it access, it becomes harder to make long runs, and stops in the middle while making a long run. Also, seems no matter how well you play, it ends game at level 3 or four.  Also,  no headings to show which level you're on. Uninstalled.  I'll stick to paid games.

you can't play the game when ads pop up DURING a move not after level is complete but right in the middle of a long chain!!! who's bright idea was that? judging by the comments your game is getting I'd say you need to fix it. Thank you for fixing the issue your patrons were experiencing with your game. I have recently started playing it again and was quite pleased that the problem had been dealt with. I felt I had to edit my earlier review. You get 5 stars across the board from me. Thank you again for taking care of the issue.

Loved this game. It was my favorite game until the iPhone pop ups. Now I can't even play the game. I don't mind ads at the beginning of every stage, but while I'm playing it just screws up the game. Uninstalling.

If you like to play a game with frequent interruptions that disrupt your timed round with "non-advertisements" then THAT is free. No point to the game if you can't utilize the time allotted for each round. I'm deleting it.

I love match 3 or more.  This is the same concept as Cinderella Free Fall it just isn't as original.  I don't like how I have a potential LONG run but it drops my run after 3 or 4 moves when I SHOULD have been able to go MUCH further as these are COMPLETELY LEGAL MOVES.  Fix this and I would probably play just for the AWESOME graphics.  Needs some work but the potential is there.

I love this game but the popups are exceedingly irritating. Every  30 seconds there is a pop up advert for Apple iPhone. I turn it down every time but it keeps coming back like a virus. I'd but the game just to rid myself of this nuisance.

Great game except for the interruptions with commercials in the middle of the game. If you have the ability to swipe 10 gems, and the commercial pops up after swiping  4 gems, when the commercial is over, you cannot continue to swipe the remaining 6 gems.  This annoying feature should be fixed.  Commercials between games are OK.
